source.description: Six-panel raster marker contact sheet generated for the July 1, 2026 whoopee cushion sticker lesson.
source.notes: The contact sheet must keep one cushion pose, nozzle direction, face placement, and marker texture from construction through the finished doodle.

process_strategy: The sequence establishes the cushion body, nozzle, puff lines, face, sticker shadow, marker fill, and highlights before the final panel only reinforces existing ink, color, and shine marks.

final_elements.name: squashed cushion body
final_elements.description: A rounded flattened cushion shape with a pinched center.

final_elements.name: small side nozzle
final_elements.description: A short nozzle sticking from one side of the cushion.

final_elements.name: comic puff lines
final_elements.description: A few curved puff marks near the nozzle.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: A bold marker outline around the cushion body, nozzle, and puff marks.

final_elements.name: goofy face
final_elements.description: Two eyes and a silly smiling mouth on the cushion.

final_elements.name: sticker shadow
final_elements.description: A small offset shadow under the cushion.

final_elements.name: red cushion fill
final_elements.description: Bright red marker fill inside the already outlined cushion body and nozzle.

final_elements.name: small white highlights
final_elements.description: Tiny shine marks on the existing cushion body and eyes.

frames.visible_job: Places the rounded flattened cushion body and light center pinch guide.
Adds the side nozzle and curved comic puff lines near the already placed cushion.
Darkens only the existing cushion, nozzle, and puff edges into a thick marker outline.
Adds the goofy face and a small offset sticker shadow under the already outlined cushion.
Fills the established cushion and nozzle with red marker and adds tiny highlights on existing shapes.

final_step.visible_job: Retraces existing outlines, deepens marker fills, and sharpens the face, puff marks, shadow, and highlights already on the page.

rejection_checks: No cushion, nozzle, puff mark, face, shadow, color fill, or highlight should first appear in the final image.
No frame may thicken, fill, or clean a shape that was not already visible.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same cushion pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
